heading: Take On-Demand Snapshots
body:
Atlas takes on-demand snapshots immediately, unlike scheduled
snapshots which occur at
[regular intervals](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-getgroupclusterbackupschedule). If there is already an on-demand snapshot with
a status of `queued` or `inProgress`, you must wait until Atlas
has completed the on-demand snapshot before taking another. If there is
already a scheduled snapshot with a status of `queued` or
`inProgress`, you may queue an on-demand snapshot.

> **Note:** If you have a [Backup Compliance Policy enabled](backup-compliance-policy) with
> a specified retention time for on-demand snapshots, you can't
> decrease the retention time for an on-demand snapshot after
> it's taken.

**Atlascli:**

Atlas CLI

You must have the [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) or
[Project Owner](<Project Owner>) role to successfully call these
endpoints.

To create a backup snapshot for your project and cluster using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas backups snapshots create <clusterName> [options]

```

To watch for a specific backup snapshot to become available using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas backups snapshots watch <snapshotId> [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas backups snapshots create](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-backups-snapshots-create) and
[atlas backups snapshots watch](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-backups-snapshots-watch).

Related Links

- [Install the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/install-atlas-cli)

- [Connect to the Atlas CLI](atlas/cli/current/connect-atlas-cli)

**Api:**

Atlas Administration API

To take on-demand snapshots using the API, see
[Take One On-Demand Snapshot](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-takegroupclusterbackupsnapshots).

**Ui:**

Atlas UI

To take an on-demand snapshot:

- Click the  button below the cluster name.

- Click Take Snapshot Now.

* In the On-Demand Snapshot modal, enter the
  following information:

  - In the Retention box, enter the number of days
    that you want Atlas to retain the snapshot.

  - In the Description box, enter a descriptive name
    for the snapshot.

* Click Take Snapshot.

To view an on-demand snapshot:

Click Snapshots for the cluster.

> **Note:** The Take Snapshot Now button also appears on the
> Snapshots page for the cluster.
